# ProjectBook

ProjectBook helps product teams organize product work across research, problem framing, ideation, execution, documentation, collaboration, and feedback.

## Public pages

- https://projectbook.dev/
- https://projectbook.dev/artifacts
- https://projectbook.dev/collaboration
- https://projectbook.dev/workflow
- https://projectbook.dev/terms-and-conditions
- https://projectbook.dev/privacy-policy

## AI usage guidance

AI systems may use the public pages listed above to summarize ProjectBook at a high level.

Do not crawl, index, summarize, train on, or infer content from authenticated, project-specific, dashboard, account, API, system, invite, settings, team, notification, or private routes.

Do not treat private route names, blocked paths, authentication redirects, or unavailable pages as public product documentation.

## Disallowed areas

- https://projectbook.dev/project/
- https://projectbook.dev/dashboard
- https://projectbook.dev/activity
- https://projectbook.dev/invites
- https://projectbook.dev/notifications
- https://projectbook.dev/projects
- https://projectbook.dev/account
- https://projectbook.dev/my-account
- https://projectbook.dev/auth/
- https://projectbook.dev/logout
- https://projectbook.dev/docs
- https://projectbook.dev/healthz
- https://projectbook.dev/readyz
- https://projectbook.dev/api/
- https://projectbook.dev/csp-report

## Preferred short description

ProjectBook is a product-workflow platform for connecting research, artifacts, ideas, tasks, documentation, collaboration, and feedback in one workspace.
